steps.name: Add OfferStatus and OfferCategoria enums to domain/entities/enums.py
Create Offer SQLAlchemy model in app/models/offer.py
Create Alembic migration for offers table
Create Offer Pydantic schemas (Create, Update, Response, List)
Create offer_service.py with CRUD, filters, pagination and S3 image upload
Create routes/offers.py with POST, GET list, GET detail, PATCH, PATCH publish, DELETE, POST interest
Register offers router in main.py
Create backend tests for offer service and routes
Move Pydantic schemas from app/models/offer.py to app/presentation/schemas/offer_schema.py
Add magic-bytes validation for image uploads (reuse documento_service logic)
Fix test_express_interest_unpublished to assert against a real draft offer (400 Bad Request)
Implement S3 partial rollback (compensation) on image upload failure
Add search filter by title/destination to GET /offers
Remove unnecessary LeadModel alias in create_lead_from_interest
Restore Pydantic validation: routes convert form data to OfferCreate/OfferUpdate schemas
Create OfferInterestResponse schema and apply to express_interest endpoint
Implement S3 cleanup of old images on offer update
Fix OfferListResponse type mismatch: use OfferListItem.model_validate
Remove unused imports from offer_service.py
Test: client GET /offers/{id} draft → 403 Forbidden
Test: client GET /offers only shows published offers
Test: RBAC denial on publish and delete for non-owner consultant
Test: invalid image uploads — magic bytes spoof, >5 images, >5MB
Test: search query param on GET /offers route
Test: express_interest with no phone → 400 Bad Request
